findings.title: Fresh exact-commit identity confirmation unavailable
findings.detail: Existing durable evidence reports a clean local HEAD, tracking ref, and live remote bos/issue-51 branch at 40750c297ed42435dabe1d4670bfda85ce92af36, but this review could not freshly confirm that both local HEAD and the remote branch still equal the requested SHA: the local command runner failed before Git execution because its sandbox launcher was unavailable, and the canonical run-history request was aborted. Passing requires affirmative current evidence.

findings.title: Exact-commit implementation evidence is otherwise security-positive
findings.detail: Confirmed EvidenceReports tied to 40750c297ed42435dabe1d4670bfda85ce92af36 describe the complete 8-file patch and regression coverage: stale missing, terminal, and unroutable waiters release provider and local reservations; provider release failure preserves local fencing; foreign ownership drops only local state; and valid owned waiters are heartbeated without consuming Attempt or retry budget. Full tests, 100.00% coverage, strict Credo, and Dialyzer are recorded passed.

findings.title: Post-merge deployment criterion remains outside this pre-merge review
findings.detail: Exact merged-artifact installation and service-health verification remain outstanding and must be bound to the exact merged commit through DeploymentVerification before terminal completion.

summary: Inconclusive: exact-commit implementation evidence is affirmative and contains no identified security defect, but this cycle could not freshly verify the required local HEAD and live remote bos/issue-51 identities, so a passing verdict is not supportable.
